---
title: comment-spacings
description: "Require a space after line-comment markers."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Require a space after line-comment markers. Strider default: directives exempt.

## Bad

```go
//Explain why this is necessary.
```

## Good

```go
// Explain why this is necessary.
```

## Enable

This extended rule runs when selected with `--only comment-spacings`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all-rules`. The default severity is `warning`.
